name: You Left the Light on in the Van
original_name: You Left the Light on in the Van
overview: Bored to Tears was an indie rock band based in Starkville Mississippi who formed in September of 2022 between four students who played throughout their college careers. In June of 2025, the band went on a final tour through the southeast and midwest United States as a farewell to the band as all members planned to disperse after graduation. While on the road, the band was joined by friends in Smokies and Morning Dew on subsequent legs of the tour before closing out the tour and the band as whole.
